tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The laboratory results are largely within normal limits, except for a mildly elevated HbA1c (6.0%), indicating suboptimal long-term glucose control and possible prediabetes or early diabetes. Renal function, electrolytes, and calcium are normal. No acute metabolic or renal disturbances are evident. Recommend clinical correlation and monitoring of glycemic control.

text.div: Provider Organization: Detská fakultná nemocnica s poliklinikou Banská Bystrica

name.value: Detská fakultná nemocnica s poliklinikou Banská Bystrica

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
